public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as deputy master.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a deputy master still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of deputy master in and around Agricultural Syndicate, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Agricultural Syndicate workable through the obligations of deputy master while managing the immediate pressure of resource depletion in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Agricultural Syndicate, that usually means carrying resource depletion, sabotage, predatory frontier ecology without letting the role of deputy master visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Rothen Stonecarve can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Rothen Stonecarve needs help with a problem in Agricultural Syndicate that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Rothen Stonecarve carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Agricultural Syndicate: the part of Agricultural Syndicate where their work actually matters day to day

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Deputy Master, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.
what_they_refuse: Rothen Stonecarve refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Deputy Master too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Rothen Stonecarve can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Rothen Stonecarve adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Rothen Stonecarve is Known locally through day-to-day work as deputy master. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Deputy Master.
